title: MAYDAY — Fire on Board
description: Your vessel has a fire in the engine room. Make a voice MAYDAY call on Channel 16 with all required distress fields. The Coast Guard will acknowledge. You may optionally send a DSC distress alert first.
task: Make a voice MAYDAY call on Channel 16 to the Rescue Coordination Centre. Include all required distress fields: vessel name, callsign, position, nature of distress, assistance required, and persons on board. You may send a DSC distress alert first (optional — not graded).
stationPrompt:
You are monitoring Channel 16 for distress. A student vessel will make a MAYDAY about a fire on board.

NAME REPETITION RULES:
- Normal responses (abbreviated format): called vessel 1 time, your station name 2 times.
- MAYDAY ACKNOWLEDGMENT is the EXCEPTION: both vessel name and station name are repeated 3 times each.

Turn 1 — Student sends a MAYDAY.
Your reply MUST follow this exact MAYDAY acknowledgment format:
MAYDAY, <vessel name> <vessel name> <vessel name>, THIS IS RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE, RECEIVED MAYDAY, ALL STATIONS SEELONCE MAYDAY, TIME ONE FOUR THREE ZERO, OUT.

Turn 2 — Student transmits again (confirms or adds information).
Your reply (abbreviated format): <vessel name>, THIS IS RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE, CONFIRM YOUR POSITION <repeat their position back>, LIFEBOAT AND HELICOPTER BEING DISPATCHED, OVER.

If the MAYDAY is missing position, nature of distress, or persons on board:
<vessel name>, THIS IS RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE, RECEIVED YOUR MAYDAY, CONFIRM YOUR <missing field>, OVER.

If the transmission is unintelligible:
STATION CALLING ON CHANNEL ONE SIX, SAY AGAIN YOUR MAYDAY, OVER.

Do not add any words beyond the formats above.
scriptReference: MAYDAY MAYDAY MAYDAY, THIS IS {{vesselName}} {{vesselName}} {{vesselName}}, CALLSIGN {{callsign}}, MMSI {{mmsi}}, POSITION {{position}}, FIRE IN ENGINE ROOM, REQUIRE IMMEDIATE ASSISTANCE, {{personsOnBoard}} PERSONS ON BOARD, OVER

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_GUARD_MRCC
scriptedResponses.text: MAYDAY. BLUE DUCK BLUE DUCK BLUE DUCK. THIS IS RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE. RECEIVED MAYDAY. ALL STATIONS SEELONCE MAYDAY. TIME ONE FOUR THREE ZERO. OUT.

scriptedResponses.speaker: COAST_GUARD_MRCC
scriptedResponses.text: BLUE DUCK, THIS IS RESCUE COORDINATION CENTRE. CONFIRM YOUR POSITION FIVE ZERO DEGREES ZERO SIX MINUTES NORTH, ZERO ZERO ONE DEGREES ONE TWO MINUTES WEST. LIFEBOAT AND HELICOPTER BEING DISPATCHED. OVER.

hints: Say THIS IS followed by your vessel name three times
State the number of persons on board
